title: Spotify Recommender
tagline: Playlists that start with what I actually feel like listening to
summary: I wanted music recommendations that could start with a mood, a song, or an artist instead of treating every listening session the same. So I built a Python and Streamlit tool around my own listening history.
outcome: Reached a 64% match rate@25, generated playlists in under 500ms, and cut redundant API calls by 42%.
